config.tabMissingNameAndIcon: Tab {{id}} needs a name or an icon
config.tabLeafHasChildren: Tab {{tabId}} is a leaf and cannot have sub-items.
config.tabGroupHasItems: Tab {{tabId}} is a group and cannot have direct URLs/files.
config.tabMixedLeafAndGroup: Tab {{tabId}} cannot mix items and sub-items.
config.pathEmpty: {{kind}} path cannot be empty in tab {{tabId}}.
config.openWithEmpty: Open-with program cannot be empty in tab {{tabId}} ({{kind}} item).
config.appNameEmpty: App name cannot be empty in tab {{tabId}}.
config.scriptCommandEmpty: Script command cannot be empty in tab {{tabId}}.
config.scriptShellInvalid: Invalid script shell: {{value}}. Use cmd, powershell, pwsh, wsl, bash, sh or zsh.
config.themeAlphaOutOfRange: Invalid transparency in {{field}}: must be between 0 and 1.
config.themeRadiusOutOfRange: Invalid radius in {{field}}: {{value}}. Out of allowed range.
config.themeRadiusInverted: Inner radius must be smaller than outer radius.

launcher.allItemsFailed: None of the {{total}} links could be opened
launcher.partialFailure: {{failed}} of {{total}} links could not be opened
launcher.scriptBlocked: Script not authorized — confirm before running.
launcher.scriptsDisabled: Scripts are disabled in this profile.
launcher.scriptCommandMismatch: Script changed since you confirmed — open the tab again to review.

io.faviconFetch: Could not fetch the site icon ({{url}}).

updater.updaterNetworkUnavailable: No network connection to check for updates.

onboarding.title: Welcome to DonutTabs!
onboarding.body: Press {{shortcut}} any time to open this menu. Hit ESC to close.

contextMenu.confirmDelete: Delete tab "{{label}}"? This cannot be undone.

scriptModal.title: Run script?
scriptModal.warning: Scripts have full access to your files and settings. Only run commands you recognize.

donut.confirmCascadeDelete: Delete group "{{label}}"? {{count}} sub-items will be removed.

profile.label: Profile:
profile.selectPrompt: Select a profile to edit or click "+ Add profile".
profile.confirmDelete: Delete profile "{{name}}"? Its tabs and settings will be lost.
profile.iconHint: An emoji or short character. Optional.
profile.validationIconTooLong: The icon must be a single character or emoji.

system.title: System
system.autostartHint: When enabled, DonutTabs starts in the tray on system boot.
system.exportImportHint: Backup / restore the config.json to sync between machines.
system.allowScriptsHint: Shell scripts always require confirmation on first execution. Disable to block all scripts in this profile.
system.scriptHistoryHint: When enabled, the 'History' tab appears in Settings and stdout/stderr from each script run is visible there (in-memory; cleared on app close). When disabled, scripts still run but their output is not captured.
system.spawnPositionHint: Sets the donut's starting point when you trigger the global shortcut.
system.quickModeLabel: Quick mode (hold to show, release to open)
system.quickModeHint: While enabled, the donut only stays visible while the global shortcut is held. Release the keys with the cursor over a tab to open it (or over the ⚙ to open settings).
system.importConfirm: Importing will replace your entire current configuration (profiles, tabs, shortcut, theme). Continue?
system.importShortcutWarning: Configuration imported, but the global shortcut for the new active profile could not be registered (likely already in use by another app). Restart DonutTabs or change the shortcut in Settings.

update.autoCheckLabel: Check for updates automatically at launch
update.autoCheckHint: When enabled, the app checks once on launch and notifies you of new versions.
update.dismissedHint: You've already been notified of this version. We won't show the alert again until the next update.

history.heading: Recent runs
history.disabled: Output capture is disabled in System preferences.
history.clearConfirm: Delete all {{count}} runs? Output cannot be recovered.

detail.truncated: Output truncated (limit reached). To see everything, redirect the script output to a file.

about.description: Open your favorite sites, apps and files with a shortcut — right from your cursor.
about.author: Author
about.supportBody: If DonutTabs helps you day-to-day, consider supporting the project. Every donation helps keep development active.

appearance.themeCustomHint: Adjustments on top of the selected preset. Apply only to this profile.
appearance.sliceGapHint: When enabled, adjacent slices show a small angular gap between them.

shortcut.hint: Press a combination with Ctrl/Alt/Shift/Super, or a standalone key like F12, Space or arrows (Enter/Esc/Tab are rejected).
shortcut.noModifier: A standalone letter or digit ({{key}}) would hijack the key in every app. Add Ctrl/Alt/Shift/Super, or use F1–F12.
shortcut.searchHint: Window-level shortcut that opens the quick tab search inside the donut. Default: Ctrl+F.
shortcut.settingsHint: Global shortcut that opens the Settings window directly, bypassing the donut. Default: Ctrl+Shift+,.

tabs.empty: No tabs yet. Click "Add tab" to begin.
tabs.selectPrompt: Select a tab to edit, or click "Add tab".

editor.name: Name
editor.iconHint: An emoji or short character. Name or icon is required.
editor.incognitoHint: Opens in private/incognito mode. Uses the browser chosen in "Open with"; with "System default", the app detects the OS default browser.
editor.confirmDelete: Delete tab "{{label}}"? This cannot be undone.
editor.validationNameOrIcon: Provide a name or an icon.
editor.validationIconTooLong: The icon must be a single character or emoji.
editor.validationAtLeastOneItem: Add at least one item (URL, file or folder).
editor.appPickerHint: Lists applications installed and detected by the system.
editor.monitorHint: Moves the cursor to the chosen screen before opening. Apps that reuse existing windows may ignore this.
editor.groupChildrenEmpty: No items yet. Add tabs or subgroups.
editor.maxDepthHint: Maximum depth reached — cannot add more subgroups here.
editor.groupNewHint: Save the group first. Then reopen it from the list or click the donut's "+" to add tabs.

focusIfOpen.label: Focus if already open
focusIfOpen.hint: Apps and tabs already open get focused; others open normally.
focusIfOpen.hintMac:
On macOS, focusing already-open URLs works with: Chrome, Safari, Edge, Arc, Brave, Vivaldi.
In other browsers, the URL may open as a new tab.
focusIfOpen.firefoxWarning: One or more URLs use Firefox as the browser. Firefox on macOS doesn't expose tabs via AppleScript, so those URLs will always open as a new tab. For tab focus, use Chrome, Safari, Edge, Arc, Brave, or Vivaldi.

scriptHelp.title: How to use scripts
scriptHelp.howItWorksBody: The command runs through the shell chosen in the row's "Shell" selector. Platform default: {{defaultShell}}.
scriptHelp.chainingBody: Operators like &&, ||, | and redirections (> >> <) work as in the terminal — the entire string is passed to the shell via -c/-Command/C.
scriptHelp.outputBody: stdout and stderr show up in the Settings "History" tab when enabled under "System". Without capture, scripts run fire-and-forget (not visible).
scriptHelp.securityBody: Untrusted scripts require confirmation on first run. The per-profile "Allow scripts" kill-switch blocks all script execution regardless of trust.

appPicker.title: Select application
appPicker.empty: No application detected. Type the name manually in the field.

wizard.confirmSkipBody: You can reopen it anytime in Settings → System.
wizard.mediaPlaceholder: Illustrative demo will be added soon.

welcome.title: Welcome to DonutTabs!
welcome.body: This quick tutorial shows how the app works and helps you configure your initial preferences. You can skip at any time.

tabs.title: Tabs
tabs.body: Each tab in the donut is a collection of things that open together: URLs, files, folders, apps, or scripts. Use the ⚙ icon or this section to create them.

demoCreateTab.title: Creating a tab
demoCreateTab.body: Add URLs, files, folders, apps, or scripts to a single tab. Everything opens at once when you select the tab in the donut.

demoSubdonuts.title: Groups and sub-donuts
demoSubdonuts.body: Group related tabs in a group — clicking opens a sub-donut with the child tabs. Useful for organizing contexts.

demoGroupInDonut.title: Groups in the donut
demoGroupInDonut.body: See how groups appear in the donut: the slice gets a marker, and clicking morphs the donut into a sub-donut with the child tabs. Click the selected group to go back.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.body: Create multiple profiles (e.g., Work, Personal, Studies) with their own tabs, shortcut, and theme. Switch via the donut center or via this Settings screen.

demoProfileSwitch.title: Switching profiles
demoProfileSwitch.body: Click the profile icon at the center of the donut to see all profiles in a ring. Select one to activate.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.body: Pick light/dark/auto theme and customize colors, opacity, and radii. Each profile can have its own appearance.

shortcut.title: Global shortcut
shortcut.body: Press the global shortcut to open the donut anywhere in the system. You can change it in Settings → Shortcut.

demoQuickMode.title: Quick mode (hold and release)
demoQuickMode.body: With quick mode enabled, the donut only appears while the shortcut is held. Release with the cursor over the desired tab to open it — no clicks.

demoSpawnPosition.title: Where the donut appears
demoSpawnPosition.body: Choose whether the donut appears at the cursor position or at the center of the active monitor. Each style has a different flow — try them out.

system.title: System
system.body: Adjust language, auto-start with the system, and permission to run scripts in this profile.
system.allowScriptsWarning: Scripts have full access to your machine and run exactly as you configured them. Enable only if you trust what you added.

demoSearchOverlay.title: Quick search in the donut
demoSearchOverlay.body: Press the search shortcut (Ctrl+F by default) with the donut open to filter tabs by name in a quick overlay.

about.title: About
about.body: Here you can see the current version and manage automatic updates. You'll also find the project's GitHub link — great for following changes and reporting bugs — and the option to support development via Ko-fi if you'd like to help keep the project going.

done.title: All set!
done.body:
Thank you for installing and using DonutTabs — I hope it speeds up your day-to-day!
You can reopen this tutorial anytime in Settings → System.
Press the global shortcut and enjoy! 🍩
